name: Tea Duck
steps: Combine all brine ingredients together and whisk to dissolve salt and sugar.
If required immediately, take 500g of water, combine with salt, sugar, and tea, bring to a simmer to dissolve and brew tea, then add to the remainder of cold water for brining.
Brine duck for a minimum of 4 hours and a maximum of 12 hours.
Remove duck from brine and let skin dry.
Remove stems from tea leaves, fine chop, and combine with salt, sugar, and Sichuan pepper for tea salt.
Brush duck with maltose glaze, season with Maldon salt, Sichuan, and 'Fragrant' pepper.
Cook duck in oven skin side up at 180C to 48C, then let rest.
